# ForgeCrawl

> Self-hosted, authenticated web scraper that converts website content into clean Markdown optimized for LLM consumption.

ForgeCrawl is a free, open-source, self-hosted alternative to Firecrawl. It provides a REST API for scraping web pages and returning clean Markdown suitable for use with large language models (LLMs).

## Key Features

- Converts web content to clean Markdown optimized for LLM consumption
- Self-hosted with full control over your data
- JWT-based authentication for API security
- SQLite database with Drizzle ORM (no external database needed)
- Built with Nuxt 4 and deployable anywhere Node.js runs
- Rate limiting, request caching, and concurrency controls
- MIT licensed and free to use

## API Endpoints

- POST /api/v1/auth/setup — Create initial admin account
- POST /api/v1/auth/login — Authenticate and receive JWT token
- POST /api/v1/scrape — Scrape a URL and return Markdown content
- GET /api/v1/health — Health check endpoint

## Links

- Website: https://forgecrawl.com
- Source code: https://github.com/cschweda/forgecrawl
- License: MIT
